allow: PowerShell($c = Get-Command claude -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.Source } else { "not on PATH" }; npm ls -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code 2>$null; where.exe claude 2>$null)

PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:APPDATA\\npm\\claude.cmd","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\claude\\claude.exe","$env:USERPROFILE\\.local\\bin\\claude.exe","$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Local\\claude\\claude.exe"\); foreach\($p in $paths\){ if\(Test-Path $p\){ "FOUND: $p"; & $p --version } }; "npm global root:"; npm root -g 2>$null)
